name: london-birthday-trip
description: Mobile-first London birthday trip guide for Tiffany and Collin.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check sw.js && node --check tools/qa-site.mjs && node --check tools/qa-image-assets.mjs
scripts.release:prepare: node tools/bust-cache.mjs && npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run site:qa
